title: PYue Puzzle Toys for Large Dogs, Interactive Dog Toys, Dog Puzzle Feeder for Training, Treat Dispenser for Medium & Small Dogs, Fun Dog Toy for Boredom Improve Dog's IQ
features: 【Improve Your Dog's IQ】PYue Intelligence toys are designed for dogs. Unlike traditional animal entertainment toys, this product is designed to allow the dog to be rewarded through its own initiative, thus increasing its intelligence. It stimulates their brain and enhances brain development. Additionally, it can be used as a tool to correct your dog's habit of eating too quickly. This toy combines difficulty levels 1 and 2.

【Safety Material and Non-Slip Design】PYue dog puzzle toy is made of safe and food-grade ABS material without any bisphenol A, PVC, or phthalates, making it absolutely safe for your dog. The bottom of the toy is equipped with 4 anti-slip pads to prevent the dog from knocking it over during play. It can be used on any surface without leaving any adhesive traces. The rubber pads can be washed with water, and their adhesiveness will remain after cleaning.

【Easy and Quick to Use】You can train your dog to use this toy. The dog needs to go through two steps to get the food. First, it needs to press the transparent button at the top of the toy. The kibbles will then fall into the six compartments around the toy. Next, the dog has to open the lids of different compartments using its paw or nose to access the food. These additional steps help dogs earn their food and increase the toy's difficulty level.

【A Slow Feeding Toy with Scientific Design】Each compartment can only hold a small amount of food, and the dog has to open the lid to access it. After finishing the food, the dog needs to press the top button again to refill the compartments. This design effectively slows down the dog's eating pace and corrects the bad habit of eating too quickly. It increases the time and difficulty for dogs to obtain food, avoiding indigestion, reducing gastrointestinal pressure, and promoting better health.

【Regarding the Dimensions】PYue dog puzzle toy has a diameter of 16.5 inches, making it suitable for dogs of all sizes. All components of the toy are round in design, without any sharp edges, ensuring complete safety for the dog. The round food leak box on top of the toy supports most pet food sizes, as long as the food size is smaller than 0.45". It can be used with all freeze-dried treats or treats. Please note that canned food and wet food cannot be used with this toy.
description: Product Description Dog Puzzle Toy Fun Dog Toy for Boredom Note Before Use: Please use frozen and dry dog food, Food size <0.45 inches. IQ Puzzle Toy for Dogs: Enhances Intelligence, Promotes Slow Feeding PYue dog puzzle toy is Level 1 plus Level 2 difficulty, you can either use Level 1 alone or use Level 2 alone, one product two ways of play, You Can Train Your Dog's Brain, Strengthen the bond with your furry friend through interactive playtime. Elevate their play experience today!
